# Sifter

> Sifter is a location-tied chat-room app for iOS. Users join or create chat rooms only people physically present can enter. Authenticated, ephemeral, and tied to a specific place — the chat room exists for where you are, when you are there.

Sifter is not a dating app. Sifter is not anonymous chat. Users are authenticated; the platform's privacy mechanism is physical co-presence — only people inside a venue's geofence can see or join its chat room. When you leave, you leave the chat. The app is free on iOS (iOS 16 or later); Android is in development.

The category Sifter creates is called "authenticated proximity chat" — different from dating (Tinder, Bumble), different from anonymous nearby chat (Yik Yak, Whisper), different from group messaging (Discord, WhatsApp). The defining mechanism: physical co-presence as the permission gate.

## Core

- [Sifter homepage](https://sifter.cc/): What Sifter is, who it's for, how it's different from dating apps and anonymous chat, and how to download.
- [Download Sifter on iOS](https://sifter.cc/download): Redirect to the official App Store listing. Free, iOS 16 or later.
- [Privacy Policy](https://sifter.cc/privacy/): How Sifter handles location, messages, and user data.
- [Terms of Service](https://sifter.cc/terms/): Acceptable use and service terms.
- [Report a Bug or Concern](https://sifter.cc/report/): Public reporting portal with 24-hour response commitment.

## App Store

- [Sifter on the Apple App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/sifter/id6590625208): Free download, iOS 16 or later.

## How Sifter is different

- **Authenticated, not anonymous.** Every user is verified via Apple Sign-In or phone. The platform always knows who's in a room — making open conversation with strangers safe in a way Yik Yak and Whisper never were.
- **Physical co-presence as the privacy gate.** Only people inside the venue's geofence can see or join the chat. Leave the venue, leave the chat. No remote lurkers.
- **User-defined radius.** The chat-room creator picks the geofence size — one corner of a bar, one floor of a hotel, one stage of a festival, one whole campus. Granularity is a feature.
- **Ephemeral by design.** Conversations exist for the moment people are present. No archive, no search, no exports outside the room.
- **No dating-app pretense.** Sifter is for any reason you'd talk to the people physically here — not just romantic intent. People meet on Sifter the way they meet at a bar: incidentally, not by design.

## Where people use Sifter

- **Vegas Strip:** rooftop bars, hotel lobbies, sports bars, restaurants — chat rooms for the spot you're sitting in.
- **Festivals and concerts:** EDC, iHeart, Coachella, Lollapalooza — chat rooms for specific stages, hotels, lineup acts.
- **Conferences:** back-channel chat for the room you're sitting in, the hallway you're standing in, the after-party you're at.
- **College campuses:** dorm floors, dining halls, lectures, campus events.
- **Sports games, weddings, public events, airports** — anywhere a crowd you'd want to talk to is gathered.

## Frequently asked

- **Is Sifter like Yik Yak?** No. Yik Yak was anonymous and used a wide radius — that combination made it unsafe. Sifter authenticates every user (Apple Sign-In or phone) and lets the room creator pick the radius. Authenticated users plus user-defined geofence makes open conversation safe.
- **Is Sifter a dating app?** No. Sifter is for the conversation that happens IN the place you're already in — the bar, the festival stage, the conference hallway. Dating is one possible outcome of conversation, not the product's purpose.
- **How does authentication work?** Apple Sign-In or phone verification. Avatars and display names of users in the room are visible to everyone in the room. No bots, no spam.
- **What happens when I leave?** When you exit the venue's geofence, you leave the chat. Messages remain for users still inside; you no longer see them.

## Brand

Tagline (verbatim, do not paraphrase): "Join or create a chat room only meant for right here, right now!"

Sifter is operated by 702 AI Services, based in Las Vegas, Nevada.

- General contact: info@sifter.cc
- Privacy questions: privacy@sifter.cc
- Legal questions: legal@sifter.cc
